title: Echo Agent Configuration
description: Configuration options for the Echo Agent plugin

prefix.title: Response Prefix
prefix.description: Text to prepend before LLM responses

suffix.title: Response Suffix
suffix.description: Text to append after LLM responses

include_metadata.title: Include Metadata
include_metadata.description: Whether to include metadata about the LLM call in the response

default_llm_id.title: Default LLM ID
default_llm_id.description: The ID of the default LLM to use. If not set, uses the first available LLM from the app.
